raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "motivational framing that positions vision and ideal as forward commitments to guide self-directed behavior change",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a person possesses or can form a distinct Vision and Ideal",
    "these constructs reliably map onto and shape future identity and actions",
    "future self-realization occurs through revelation rather than solely through effort",
    "distinguishing Vision from Ideal adds functional value for personal development"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as parallel poetic metaphor but relies on vague, non-operational distinctions that limit precision",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "recipient treats the statement as a prompt to define actionable Vision and Ideal, then aligns daily behavior with them over time",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "statement is interpreted as guaranteeing outcomes without requiring consistent action, or when Vision/Ideal encode maladaptive or unrealistic self-images"
}
